title: Galangal and Monsoon Jjigae Bap
description: A spicy Korean-inspired dish made with galangal, monsoon sauce, and marinated ingredients, served with a side of crispy bap.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated galangal and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the marinated bap slices and cook for 2-3 minutes until crispy.
Add the monsoon sauce and gochujang, and stir to combine.
Add the green onions and toasted sesame seeds (if using), and stir to combine.
Season with soy sauce and rice vinegar (if using) to taste.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Serve immediately with additional monsoon sauce and green onions on top.
